parameters.content:
## Phase 1 Enhanced Workflow
**Enhancements:**
- ✅ EMA Smoothing for personality estimates
- ✅ Verification/refinement pipeline
- ✅ Database persistence with PostgreSQL
- ✅ Webhook API endpoints
- ✅ Session continuity management
- ✅ Confidence-weighted regulation

**Key Improvements:**
- Personality estimates evolve smoothly across turns
- Automated response quality verification
- Full session persistence for continuity
- Real-time API for external integration
- Confidence-based directive application
